title: peltophorus
intro: Peltophorus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the tree of the gods or the horse bean tree. The medicinal properties of Peltophorus include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Peltophorus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of certain cancers and improve overall well-being. Peltophorus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential side effects.
